---
title: "The Learn-It-All Educator"
---

::: {.content-hidden when-format="pdf"}
::: {.callout-note}
Machajewski, Szymon. (2026). *The Learn-It-All Educator*. Zenodo. [https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19041123](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19041123)

Copyright © 2026 Szymon Machajewski · CC BY 4.0

[dataii.com/ai/guidebook](https://dataii.com/ai/guidebook/)

This copy is hosted in preparation for an elective course on *Generative AI som finurlig kognitiv partner* at DPU, Aarhus University.
:::
:::
